title: Align Systemkatalog learning roles
goal: Move the active evidence-learning relation from retired Heimlern to Vibe-Lab while keeping Chronik as append-only historical truth and Bureau as decision owner.

acceptance.assertion: Heimlern has no active learning truth ownership and is described as a retained historical reference.
Chronik may provide frozen historical evidence to Vibe-Lab with no automatic policy or task application.
Vibe-Lab may export reviewed proposal candidates while Bureau remains the sole task decision owner.
